summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LuaYou gamified Lua learning platform. Backend APIs working at 100% success rate. Frontend flows working correctly with minor navigation issues.

design_issues.issue: Profile navigation uses header-profile-btn and header-avatar instead of nav-profile
Leaderboard shows 0 entries but may be loading state

passed_tests: Backend: All 16 API endpoints working (auth, lessons, quiz, code execution, daily challenges, leaderboard, user stats, AI tutor)
Frontend: Landing page loads with correct branding and features
Frontend: Sign up flow works - user registration and redirect to dashboard
Frontend: Login flow works - admin login successful
Frontend: Dashboard displays user stats, XP progress, daily challenge, recent lessons
Frontend: Navigation to lessons page works
Frontend: Lesson detail page loads with content, code examples, challenge description
Frontend: Code editor functional - can type and execute code
Frontend: Navigation between lesson tabs (Lesson, Quiz, AI Tutor)
Frontend: Header navigation and user info display correctly
